evals.prompt:
Read the doc-generator.md template at reference/prompts/doc-generator.md and fill in its variables with these values. Output the complete rendered prompt in a code block.

- 情境: single
- category: search-and-filter
- module: orders
- 頁面: /admin/orders_v2
- 主題: 訂單搜尋與篩選
evals.expected_output: 完整的 doc-generator.md prompt，所有變數已填入：情境=single, category=search-and-filter, module=orders, 頁面=/admin/orders_v2, 主題=訂單搜尋與篩選, 檔案路徑=docs/orders/search-and-filter.md

evals.prompt:
Read the doc-generator.md template at reference/prompts/doc-generator.md and fill in its variables with these values. Output the complete rendered prompt in a code block.

- 情境: single
- category: tcat-shipping
- module: payments-and-logistics
- 頁面: /admin/orders
- 主題: 宅配通出貨流程
- 特別要求: 只需要補操作步驟段落就好，其他部分不用
evals.expected_output: 完整 prompt，填入情境=single, category=tcat-shipping, module=payments-and-logistics, 頁面=/admin/orders, 主題=宅配通出貨流程, 檔案路徑=docs/payments-and-logistics/tcat-shipping.md，特別要求已註明只補操作步驟段落

evals.prompt:
Read the doc-generator.md template at reference/prompts/doc-generator.md and fill in its variables with these values. Output the complete rendered prompt in a code block.

- 情境: series
- 關聯文件: 超商取貨設定 → 超商出貨流程 → 配送狀態對照表
- 文件 A: category=cvs-pickup-setting, module=payments-and-logistics, 頁面=/admin/logistics/cvs, 主題=設定超商取貨
- 文件 B: category=cvs-shipping, module=payments-and-logistics, 頁面=/admin/orders_v2, 主題=超商出貨流程
- 文件 C: category=delivery-status, module=payments-and-logistics, 主題=配送狀態對照表
evals.expected_output: 完整 prompt，情境=series，關聯文件已填入，三份文件的變數皆已填入且正確
